title: crotalaria mortonii
intro: Crotalaria mortonii, also known as Morton's rattlebox, is a flowering plant species in the legume family (Fabaceae). The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria mortonii include its potential to treat various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria mortonii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine in certain parts of the world.
